application_ref.description: Application reference. If provided, the latest revision of the default variant is deployed.

application_variant_ref.description: Variant reference. Its latest revision is deployed.

application_revision_ref.description: Revision reference. The exact revision is deployed.

environment_revision_ref.description: Target environment revision; advanced use only.

key.title: Key
key.description: Deployment key inside the environment revision. Defaults to `{application_slug}.revision`.

message.title: Message
message.description: Optional commit message attached to the environment revision.

schema.title: ApplicationRevisionDeployRequest
schema.description:
Request body for `POST /applications/revisions/deploy`.

Attaches an application revision to an environment under a key. Subsequent
calls to `/applications/revisions/retrieve` with the matching
`environment_ref` resolve to this revision.
See the [Applications guide](/reference/api-guide/applications#deployment).
